Interface IServerObjectAdmin3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Server
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Server.dll

Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

[Guid("E5079624-E7C9-4B12-9DF7-2BC1C341A2B7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IServerObjectAdmin3 : IServerObjectAdmin2, IServerObjectAdmin
